caption.text:
We have come to the end of Season 2 of Feast With Friends.

To our incredible host @shikshaarora  thank you for the heart, the laughter, and the unforgettable moments you brought to every episode. You did not just host this season, you made it come alive.

Asante sana for the passion, the energy, and the memories. You carried this season so beautifully, and it would not have been the same without you.

You will always be part of the Feast With Friends family.

Drop a comment below and help us say thank you for an amazing season ❤️

caption.text:
Meet the Tree Hugging Queen, @truphena_muthoni  as she joins our host @shikshaarora  in the kitchen for a candid and inspiring conversation about how she achieved the incredible feat of hugging a tree for 72 hours and earned her place in the Guinness World Records.

From endurance and purpose to her passion for protecting nature, you can't afford to miss this inspiring episode showing on our YouTube channel.

caption.text:
Today we celebrate every woman who rises, builds, cares, leads, and dreams bigger than the world expects. You are powerful in ways that cannot always be seen, but they are always felt.
Happy International Women’s Day from Festive.
#InternationalWomensDay #CelebrateHer #FestiveBread #SheIsEnough

caption.text:
Behind many strong families is a woman who wakes up early and shows up every single day.

Today we celebrate the women who nourish, care, and keep our homes running with love.

Tag a woman who deserves breakfast in bed this Sunday. 
Happy Women’s Day!!

#WomensDay #CelebrateHer #FestiveMoments
